title: BEM-866 inspect Claude step placement
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/claude.yml')
lines = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if p.exists() else []
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_claude_step_placement')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
for i, line in enumerate(lines, 1):
    if 'BEM-866 mailbox write' in line or 'Commit role result' in line or 'workflow_dispatch' in line or 'trace_id' in line or 'jobs:' in line or 'steps:' in line or 'if:' in line:
        safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in line.strip())[:120] or 'blank'
        marker = outdir / (str(i).zfill(4) + '_' + safe + '.md')
        marker.write_text('# BEM-866 claude step placement\nLine: ' + str(i) + '\nText: ' + line + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(marker))
        count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CLAUDE_STEP_PLACEMENT_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-866 claude step placement index\nCount: ' + str(count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('inspected claude step placement: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
